card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 1 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until a Methuselah is ousted.
During each Methuselah's unlock phase, that Methuselah can put the top card of their library in play (face up); it becomes a nameless, textless ghoul ally with 2 life, 2 strength and 1 bleed. After that ally is burned or this event leaves play, remove that ally from the game. After a Methuselah is ousted, burn this card.

rulings.text: Putting the top card of your library in play as a ghoul does not count as playing the card. [LSJ 20040531]
The card used to represent the ally is face up, but the name on that card is ignored if something goes looking for a card by name. They do not contest. [LSJ 20040623] [LSJ 20071003]

A burned ghoul is removed from the game, but it is still burned (e.g. it triggers {Tension in the Ranks}). However, when Absimillard's Army is removed from the game, the ghouls are removed without burning (will not trigger {Tension in the Ranks}). [LSJ 20090920]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]
Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Absimiliard's Army

card_text:
Gehenna.
Once each master phase, a Methuselah can use a master phase action to exchange a master card in his or her hand for one in his or her ash heap.
flavor_text:
The Red Star shines brightly -- more so, I am told, to those with the gift of superior sight, but it is obvious even to me. Can you truly not see that Gehenna is upon us?
Prince Giangaleazzo, Lasombra antitribu
name: Anthelios, The Red Star

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until your next discard phase.
Requires at least two other Gehenna cards controlled by other Methuselahs in play. During each Methuselah's unlock phase, he or she chooses a ready vampire he or she controls. The chosen vampire takes 1 unpreventable damage. Earth Meld cards cost 2 additional blood.

rulings.text: The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Becoming of Ennoia

card_text:
Inquisition.
Requires a ready imbued in play. Whenever there are any ready imbued in play, any action to put a vampire or ghoul in play or to add counters to an uncontrolled vampire gets -1 stealth and costs an additional blood or life.

rulings.text: Affects actions that add counters to vampires in the uncontroled region conditionally (eg {Undue Influence}, {Feast of the Soul's Secrets}) [LSJ 20060414] [ANK 20240118-2]

name: Blood Cult Awareness Network

card_text:
Gehenna.
Burn all boons. No more boons can be put in play. During each Methuselah's unlock phase, that Methuselah can move 1 blood from a vampire they control to a vampire controlled by another Methuselah.
flavor_text:
Yes, well, we all get angry or scared or hungry sometimes. That can make us forget our promises.
Stuart Eberhardt, Caitiff

rulings.text: Does not prevent {Consanguineous Boon} to be played. [LSJ 20040531-2]

name: Blood Trade

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until a vampire commits diablerie.
During an action, cards minions play requiring 1 or more Disciplines are not replaced until the end of that action or until a Methuselah's hand is empty (whichever comes first). Vampires who commit diablerie ignore this effect until a Gehenna event is played.
flavor_text:
Regain the power that is yours! Feel the blood flow through you, as it should!
Karen Suadela, Brujah prince

rulings.text: You do not replace cards that require a discipline during any action. [ANK 20201015]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]

name: Blood Weakens

card_text:
Gehenna.
Imbued get -1 intercept when attempting to block monsters. A ready monster can enter combat with an imbued as a Ⓓ action.
flavor_text:
The shaft of the arrow had been feathered with one of the eagle's own plumes. We often give our enemies the means of our own destruction.
Aesop, "The Eagle and the Arrow"
name: Break the Code

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 2 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until your next discard phase.
During each Methuselah's unlock phase, that Methuselah can choose a location controlled by their prey. The chosen location is burned unless its controller burns 2 pool.
flavor_text:
More bombs? More fire? More accidents? What of the Masquerade?
Federico di Padua, Nosferatu archon

rulings.text: The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Conquest of Humanity

card_text:
Government.
During your unlock phase, add two counters to this card from the blood bank. When a vampire with capacity less than X is blocked while hunting, where X is the number of counters on this card, burn that vampire and all the counters on this card.

rulings.text: If the action is blocked, *all* effects that would be triggered by a successful block (eg. {Banshee Ironwail}) must be applied (ordered by the acting Methuselah).  Other effects and modifiers (eg. {Crypt's Sons}, {Change of Target}) can only be used after all triggered effects have been handled. [ANK 20220116] [ANK 20211207] [ANK 20210627]

name: Dr. Marisa Fletcher, CDC

fr.name: Lié par le Dragon
fr.card_text:
Géhenne. À ne pas remplacer tant que cette carte est en jeu.
Durant la phase de défausse de chaque Mathusalem, ce Mathusalem brûle 1 point de réserve pour chaque vampire en torpeur sous son contrôle.
fr.flavor_text:
Est-ce comme ça que cela se termine ? Finalement, je vais peut-être rester.
Ramona, Gangrel

es.name: Encadenado al Dragón
es.card_text:
Gehenna. No la reemplaces mientras esta carta esté en juego.
Durante la fase de descarte de cada Matusalén, ese Matusalén quema 1 de reserva sanguínea por cada vampiro en letargo que controle.
es.flavor_text:
¿Es así como es al final? Quizás me quede.
Ramona, Gangrel

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
During each Methuselah's discard phase, that Methuselah burns 1 pool for each vampire in torpor they control.
flavor_text:
Is this what it's like at the very end? Maybe I'll just stay.
Ramona, Gangrel
name: Dragonbound

card_text:
Gehenna.
Requires at least one other Gehenna card in play. Each imbued can have (and use) one power card for which he or she doesn't meet the requirements. An imbued who performs a successful action may gain 1 conviction [1 CONVICTION] from his or her ash heap. An imbued can only gain 1 conviction [1 CONVICTION] this way each turn.

rulings.text: The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Edge Explosion

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 3 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
There is no Camarilla. Instead, Camarilla vampires are considered Independent.

rulings.text: Cards that change a vampire's sect to Camarilla can still be played, but he becomes Independent until the Fall is removed from play. [LSJ 20040519]

Is a temporary effect that overrides the underlying sect. The most recent override takes precedence, but if a more recent would set the sect to Camarilla, it sets it to Independent instead while the Fall is in play. If the Fall leaves play, the vampire retrieves his underlying sect. [LSJ 20080510] [LSJ 20100811] [ANK 20190619]
Vampires with a Camarilla title lose the benefit from it until they becomre Camarilla again. They immediately yield the title if it is contested or if they receives a new one. [LSJ 20060904]
An "impersonator" (eg. {Vlad Tepes}) can still play cards requiring Camarilla or a Camarilla title. [LSJ 20050124] [ANK 20230503]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Fall of the Camarilla

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 3 or more other Gehenna events in play. Not usable if a ready vampire is Black Hand. Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
There is no Sabbat. Instead, Sabbat vampires are considered Independent.

rulings.text: Cards that change a vampire's sect to Sabbat can still be played, but he becomes Independent until the Fall is removed from play. [LSJ 20040519]

Is a temporary effect that overrides the underlying sect. The most recent override takes precedence, but if a more recent would set the sect to Sabbat, it sets it to Independent instead while the Fall is in play. If the Fall leaves play, the vampire retrieves his underlying sect. [LSJ 20080510] [LSJ 20100811] [ANK 20190619]
Vampires with a Sabbat title lose the benefit from it until they becomre Sabbat again. They immediately yield the title if it is contested or if they receives a new one. [LSJ 20060904]
An "impersonator" (eg. {Vlad Tepes}) can still play cards requiring Sabbat or a Sabbat title. [LSJ 20050124] [ANK 20230503]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Fall of the Sabbat

card_text:
Government.
If an ally is burned in combat with an acting vampire, add 1 counter to this card and inflict 2 unpreventable environmental damage on the acting vampire after the combat ends. If this card has 4 counters, burn it.

rulings.text: Does not trigger if the ally is saved by {Left for Dead}. [PIB 20121028]
Does not trigger if the ally is considered the acting minion during the combat (eg. {Nar-Sheptha}). [ANK 20180913-2]
Does trigger if the ally burns by himself at the end of combat (eg. {Escaped Mental Patient}). [LSJ 20100527]

name: FBI Special Affairs Division

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until a vampire commits diablerie.
This card comes into play with 10 counters. After another Gehenna event is played, burn 1 counter from this card. Blood hunts cannot be called on vampires with capacity greater than the number of counters on this card who diablerize a younger vampire.
flavor_text:
I'm starting to hear whispers of warehouses and old office buildings converted to internment centers — and buffets.
Okulos, Nosferatu

rulings.text: Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]

name: Fueled by Heart's Blood

card_text: If a vampire successfully hunts, move 1 blood from that vampire to this card after resolution. Burn this card if it has 5 blood.

rulings.text: If the vampire gains no blood from their hunt, it's not successful, so Hunger Moon's effect does not apply. [LSJ 20050720-2]

name: Hunger Moon

card_text:
Inconnu.
A Methuselah may spend four transfers and remove a vampire in his or her uncontrolled region from the game to search for any card in his or her library and put it in his or her hand (discarding and shuffling afterward).
name: Inconnu Tutelage

card_text:
Inconnu. Do not replace until your next unlock phase.
Minion cards that change the target of a bleed action cost +1 blood or life.

rulings.text: Is replaced before unlocking cards: other unlock effects cannot be ordered before. [ANK 20200129] [LSJ 20091208] [RTR 19951017]

name: Narrow Minds

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until your next discard phase.
During each Methuselah's unlock phase, for each minion they control, they lock that minion unless they discard a card; cards discarded this way are not replaced until the master phase. Mortal allies and vampires with capacity greater than the number of Gehenna events in play ignore this effect.

rulings.text: You can handle the effect by locking an already locked minion, then use his Infernal trait to unlock them. [ANK 20210322-2]
Mortal allies are not affected, and vampires with capacity above the number of Gehenna cards in play are not affected. [LSJ 20040415]
The effect only triggers once each unlock phase. Any minions put into play after the effect is resolved are unaffected until their Methuselah's next unlock phase. [REVERSAL] [ANK 20250121]

name: Nightmares upon Nightmares

card_text:
Government.
Any minion who successfully performs an equip action unlocks at the end of the turn.

rulings.text: Does not affect equip actions performed prior to its arrival in play. [LSJ 20061218]
The minions who performed an equip action when it was in play unlock at the end of turn regardless of whether NRA PAC is still in play or not. [LSJ 20080619]

name: NRA PAC

card_text:
Government.
During the first combat between an acting vampire and a blocking vampire each turn, neither combatant may end combat as a strike in the first round. A Methuselah may use a discard phase action to burn this card if his or her minions attempted no actions in the current turn.

rulings.text: Only applies once each turn for the first eligible combat. [LSJ 20050215]

name: NSA Trio

card_text:
Government.
When a Methuselah uses a discard phase action to discard a card, he or she doesn't draw to replace that card until his or her next unlock phase.

rulings.text: The cards are replaced before unlocking cards: other unlock effects cannot be ordered before. [ANK 20200129] [LSJ 20091208]

name: Port Authority

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 2 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
During each Methuselah's unlock phase, if that Methuselah controls 3 or more vampires of the same clan, they burn one of those vampires. If that vampire's capacity is 6 or more, that Methuselah ignores this effect until the end of the game.

rulings.text: The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Recalled to the Founder

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until a vampire successfully hunts.
Vampires cannot hunt unless they must hunt. Vampires who must hunt can steal 1 blood from a younger vampire as a Ⓓ hunt action.

rulings.text: Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]
A minion can only perform this special hunt once per turn. [RBK action-card-or-card-in-play]

This special hunt cannot steal more blood than the target has. It can target a vampire with no blood. If no blood is stolen, the hunt is unsuccessful, even if the action stays successful. [LSJ 20050720-2] [RTR 20010711] [LSJ 20100915]
rulings.group: Steal blood as a Hunt action

rulings.text: The blood stolen by this special hunt goes to the blood bank if it cannot be gained by the vampire. [LSJ 20010809-1]
rulings.group: Steal blood as a Hunt action

rulings.text: This special hunt must be directed at a vampire, even if none has any blood. It cannot be performed if there are no other vampires. [LSJ 19970224]
rulings.group: Steal blood as a Hunt action

rulings.text: Is affected by Hunt value. All blood that is gained from the Hunt is taken from the target minion. ({Festivo dello Estinto} is not blood gained from the hunt) [RTR 20180511] [RTR 20030519]
rulings.group: Steal blood as a Hunt action

name: Restricted Vitae

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 1 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until a vampire becomes a liaison.
Independent vampires can receive the unique Independent title of Liaison (worth 4 votes) as an action. If this title would be contested with a younger vampire, the younger vampire immediately yields instead of contesting.

rulings.text: The title stays in play when the event is removed (eg {The Uncoiling}) but can't be claimed any more with the action. [LSJ 20070125]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Rise of the Nephtali

card_text: During your discard phase, you can burn a vampire with capacity 2 or less, and your predator takes control of this card (even if you do not burn a vampire).

rulings.text: If the option to burn a vampire is used, the card goes to the predator immediately, even if there is still a mandatory effect to resolve. If not, the predator must take the card when he has the opportunity to play an effect, after the acting Methuselah applied other mandatory effects (eg. losing blood to {Dragonbound}). [ANK 20200508-1]

name: Scourge of the Enochians

card_text:
Event.
Each Methuselah gets +2 hand size for each victory point he or she has.
flavor_text: Keep a little and let a little come back to me.

rulings.text: When the controller is ousted, their predator does not draw cards. [ANK 20230527-2]

name: The Bitter and Sweet Story

card_text:
Requires 2 or more Gehenna events in play.
After this card enters play, burn all Gehenna events and conviction cards, then send all vampires with capacity 3 or less to torpor. Gehenna events cannot be played.
name: The Fourth Cycle

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 1 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until a titled vampire goes to torpor.
During each Methuselah's unlock phase, that Methuselah can choose a ready vampire controlled by their prey. The chosen vampire takes 1 unpreventable environmental damage. Titled vampires can call a referendum to burn this card as a +1 stealth political action.

rulings.text: When a vampire goes to torpor, the card is replaced before any other effect (eg. before losing pool to {Fame}). [LSJ 20100527]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). [LSJ 20080604]
rulings.group: Action requirements from a card in play

name: The New Inquisition

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires at least 2 other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until your prey is ousted.
A Methuselah cannot gain pool during their own turn unless they have the Edge or at least 1 victory point (instead, any pool they would gain goes to the blood bank).

rulings.text: Anything that would increase the pool amount is considered "gaining pool". [ANK 20181105]
Methuselahs do not gain the pool granted by a bleed action (eg. {Kindred Spirits}) if they do not have the edge or a VP beforehand. [LSJ 20100206-2]
Methuselahs gain the pool granted by an effect after a successful bleed action (eg. {The unnamed}), since they get the edge before the effect kicks in. [LSJ 20100210-2]
When ousting their prey, Methuselahs decide if they gain the VP before or after gaining the pool. [LSJ 20100208]
{Off Kilter}'s additional pool cannot be gained if you do not have a VP (edge is burned before pool is gained). [LSJ 20100207]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]

name: The Rising

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 1 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until a vampire commits diablerie.
Cards requiring 1 or more Disciplines at the superior level cost +1 blood. Vampires who commit diablerie ignore this effect until a Gehenna event is played.
flavor_text:
It's only a question of time before the withering hits me, and hard.
Beckett, Gangrel

rulings.text: The additional cost is paid at the same time the normal cost is paid. [ANK 20190625]
Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: The Slow Withering

card_text:
Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
During your discard phase, burn another event at random. Other Methuselahs can use a discard phase action and burn X pool to burn this card, where X is the number of other events in play.
name: The Uncoiling

fr.name: Le masque tombe
fr.card_text:
Géhenne. À ne pas remplacer jusqu'à votre prochaine phase de défausse.
Les alliés reçoivent +1 en interception contre les vampires.
fr.flavor_text:
Ceux qui sont pris de panique ont la fâcheuse habitude de ne pas respecter nos traditions de la Mascarade.
Hardestadt, Ventrue

es.name: Desenmascaramiento, El
es.card_text:
Gehenna. No la reemplaces hasta tu siguiente fase de descarte.
Los aliados obtienen +1 de intercepción contra vampiros.
es.flavor_text: Los que son presas del pánico tienen el desafortunado hábito de olvidar nuestras tradiciones de Mascarada

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until your next discard phase.
Allies get +1 intercept against vampires.
flavor_text:
Those in the grip of panic have an unfortunate habit of disregarding our traditions of Masquerade.
Hardestadt, Ventrue
name: The Unmasking

card_text:
Gehenna.
After each Methuselah's minion phase ends, each ready vampire controlled by that Methuselah with capacity less than the number of Gehenna events in play who did not hunt during that minion phase burns 1 blood.
flavor_text:
Night after night. Rising, hunting, killing, feeding. Nothing more than ambulatory corpses without the good sense to lie down and be still.
Felton, Tremere

rulings.text: The hunt need not be successful for a vampire to avoid the effect. [LSJ 20050727]

name: Thirst

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace until a vampire moves from torpor to the ready region.
Actions performed by vampires in torpor cost +1 blood. Rescuing an older vampire from torpor costs +1 blood.
flavor_text:
There is no after for us, and yet there is an after if kine survive.
Anonymous Malkavian, "Das Buch vom Grabkrieg"

rulings.text: Is not replaced until the condition is met, even if it is burned. [LSJ 20080805]

name: Torpid Blood

card_text:
Inconnu.
Blood hunt referendums get an additional 2 votes against the referendum.
flavor_text:
If you want it you're gonna bleed
But it's the price you pay.
Guns N' Roses, "Welcome to the Jungle"
name: Urban Jungle

card_text:
Gehenna. Do not replace as long as this card is in play.
Each turn, when a vampire plays his or her first card that turn that requires any Disciplines, that vampire's controller reveals the top card of his or her library (before drawing to replace). If it is a master card, the original card has no effect (no cost is paid), and in addition, if the original card required Obtenebration [obt], the vampire burns 2 blood.

rulings.text: The card that has no effect still counts as played, if it was an action, the vampire is not locked and can perform another (or the same) action. [LSJ 20090323]
Does not affect allies who play cards requiring a Discipline "as a vampire". [LSJ 20050606]
The effect needs to be applied before anyone has an opportunity to play another cancellation effect (eg. {Direct Intervention}). [LSJ 20100728] [LSJ 20090213]

name: Veil of Darkness

card_text:
Transient.
Put this card in play with 10 counters. Whenever a non-Anarch vampire takes an action, burn a counter from this card. Burn this card when it has no counters. During your unlock phase, each anarch burns 1 blood or becomes Camarilla, and each ally burns 1 life.

rulings.text: If an action is cancelled after it has been played (e.g. {Tangle Atropos' Hand} but not {Direct Intervention}) it still counts as taken. [ANK 20210124]

name: Waiting Game

card_text:
Transient.
During your next discard phase, you must burn this card, and you may either burn a vampire in torpor or, by locking a ready werewolf ally you control or discarding a White Nights Massacre from your hand, burn all vampires in torpor.
name: White Nights Massacre

card_text:
Gehenna. Requires 1 or more other Gehenna events in play. Do not replace until your next discard phase.
This card comes into play with 10 counters. After another Gehenna event is played, burn 1 counter from this card. Vampires with capacity greater than X are considered vampires with capacity X (minimum of 1), where X is the number of counters on this card.

rulings.text: Ceils the vampire's capacity, including effects that have changed it, to X. {Orun} adds to that X, or the vampire's capacity if it is lower, for cards played by other players. [LSJ 20051205]
When a vampire is influenced, the excess blood drains off before entering contest (if any) and before playing "as played/as he enters play" effects. [LSJ 20100902]
The "other Gehenna cards in play" requirement is only checked when playing the card. [PIB 20121031]

name: Wormwood
